nasb.text: Your fathers went down to Egypt seventy persons in all, and now the Lord your God has made you as numerous as the stars of heaven.

esv.text: Your fathers went down to Egypt seventy persons, and now the Lord your God has made you as numerous as the stars of heaven.

cnv.text: 你的列祖下到埃及的時候，一共不過七十人，現在耶和華你的　神卻使你的人數像天上的星那麼多了。”

ccb.text: 当年你们祖先下埃及时，只有七十人，现在你们的上帝耶和华使你们多如天上的星辰。
